# Transcrição: Create_More_Than_Anyone_Else

- **Fonte:** Create_More_Than_Anyone_Else
- **Duração:** 00:59
- **Idioma:** en
- **Modelo:** small

---

## [00:00 - 00:59]

Create more than anyone else. The best way to stand out in any type of content format, whether it's video, podcasting, or blogging, is to create more content than anyone else is willing to create. While this may sound like hustle culture nonsense, hear me out. I don't want you creating content at all hours of the night and weekends. This is about a daily commitment and pushing through those difficult times when others would quit. Your motivation can't come from the success of your last video. If it does, you will quit just like almost everyone else. By maintaining steady motivation, you'll create when things are going well and when it seems like no one is consuming your content. Because of that persistent creation, you'll learn countless valuable lessons about how to create better content. You'll refine your topic, your process, and your delivery. It sounds simple, but there's a reason that most people don't do it. It's easy to make excuses when things don't go your way and lose motivation. Keep going. Keep creating. It pays off.
